message:
Running command: # Check how nc_ahbl_to_apb uses rst_n in the bridge
grep -n "rst_n" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/amba.v | head -20

# Now let me understand the REAL issue - check what the m0_haddr_req is connected to in the fabric
# and whether the m0_hready signal is correct
grep -n "m0_haddr_req\|m0_haddr\|m0_hready" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | head -20
